name: SolSolfachord Gracia
name_jp: ソドレミコード・グレーシア
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
Your opponent cannot activate a Spell/Trap Card, or monster effect, when your "Solfachord" Pendulum Monster(s) is Pendulum Summoned.

[ Monster Effect ] 
While you have an even Pendulum Scale in your Pendulum Zone, if your "Solfachord" Pendulum Monster attacks, your opponent cannot activate monster effects until the end of the Damage Step. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Solfachord" Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand. You can only use this effect of "SolSolfachord Gracia" once per turn.
pend_eff: Your opponent cannot activate a Spell/Trap Card, or monster effect, when your "Solfachord" Pendulum Monster(s) is Pendulum Summoned.

If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Solfachord" Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand. You can only use this effect of "SolSolfachord Gracia" once per turn.

mst: Prevents activation of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Prevents activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
Prevents activation of your opponent's Trap Cards
misc: Requires control of specific Pendulum Scale
Requires control of specific Monster type
